revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing programmatically created pages and categories

revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Namespace and pagename-detecting templates/doc]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:bump February 13, 2025 bump]][[en:Namespace and pagename-detecting templates/doc]][[Category:bump February 13, 2025 bump]]

#redirect[[en:Template:Namespace and pagename-detecting templates/doc]] [[Category:qq]][[sn::Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:qq]][[sn::bump February 13, 2025 bump]][[en:Namespace and pagename-detecting templates/doc]][[Category:qq]][[sn::bump February 13, 2025 bump]]

#redirect[[en:Template:Namespace and pagename-detecting templates/doc]] [[Category:11]][[sn::Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:11]][[sn::bump February 13, 2025 bump]][[en:Namespace and pagename-detecting templates/doc]][[Category:11]][[sn::bump February 13, 2025 bump]]

#redirect[[:en:Template:Namespace and pagename-detecting templates/doc]] [[Category:11]][[sn::Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:11]][[sn::bump February 13, 2025 bump]][[en:Namespace and pagename-detecting templates/doc]][[Category:11]][[sn::bump February 13, 2025 bump]]

#redirect[[:en:Template:Namespace and pagename-detecting templates/doc]] [[sn::Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[sn::bump February 13, 2025 bump]][[en:Namespace and pagename-detecting templates/doc]][[sn::bump February 13, 2025 bump]]

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23515730952|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24951476559|time triggered pipeline]]
